name: npx shadcn-ui@latest add ALL < installs all components > #2027
snippet: You can install all components in a go by using npx shadcn-ui@latest add without specifying any component name. For removing deps, knip.dev is a popular option.

name: Shadcn add fails: v0 component 'date-picker' not found in registry
snippet: The v0 component appears to have an invalid dependency declared (pointing to date-picker.json), which doesn't exist in the official shadcn/ui registry.
